description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Compiler Tests that runs compiler tests for gem5. The workflow is triggered manually via a workflow dispatch. It consists of three jobs: all-compilers, latest-compilers-all-gem5-builds, and compiler-tests. The all-compilers job runs a matrix of compiler tests across different images and optimization levels. The latest-compilers-all-gem5-builds job tests the latest compilers against all gem5 compilations. The compiler-tests job indicates whether the compiler tests have passed or not.
